name: deja-vu

descFull: Your agents already solved this. deja finds it — memory operations for fifteen coding agents: retroactive search and MCP recall (84.9% R@1 on LongMemEval-S, no LLM), trust scopes, curated notes with tags and lifecycle states, measured impact. One zero-dep binary, fully local.
